mapper.select: SELECT user_uuid, user_email, user_password, user_name, user_profile_image, user_gender, user_birth_date, user_motto, user_status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE user_email = #{userEmail}

SELECT user_uuid, user_email, user_password, user_name, user_profile_image, user_gender, user_birth_date, user_motto, user_status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_uuid, user_email, user_password, user_name, user_profile_image, user_status ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, #{userEmail}, #{userPassword}, #{userName}, #{userProfileImage}, COALESCE(#{userStatus}, 'ACTIVE') )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_status = #{userStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid}

UPDATE users SET user_profile_image = #{userProfileImage}, user_gender = #{userGender}, user_birth_date = #{userBirthDate}, user_motto = #{userMotto}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid}
mapper.select: SELECT c.category_name FROM user_interests ui JOIN categories c ON ui.category_no = c.category_no WHERE ui.user_uuid = #{userUuid} ORDER BY ui.interest_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_interests (user_uuid, category_no) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, (SELECT category_no FROM categories WHERE category_name = #{categoryName}) )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_password = #{userPassword}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid}
